name: Self-Improving Agent
description: Self-reflection, correction logging, persistent tiered memory, WAL protocol, cold-boot recovery, and automated daily review with self-healing cron. Learns from corrections, manages memory that compounds execution quality across restarts and context resets. The nightly cron rewrites workspace .md files with new lessons — no behavioral compliance required.
author: joel-yi

changelog.3.2.0: Auto-inject workspace hooks (zero manual steps), corrections trimming, self-healing cron, persistence auto-fix, dry-run, model safety, WAL-feeds-cron, ClawHub manifest
changelog.3.1.0: Self-healing cron, persistence auto-fix, dry-run, model safety, WAL-feeds-cron, ClawHub manifest
changelog.3.0.0: Automated daily review cron, seed content, post-install verification, cron-prompt command
changelog.2.0.0: Tiered memory, WAL protocol, cold-boot recovery, heartbeat rules, workspace integration
